payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow raised frame; vertical rectangular piece, slightly edge-cropped at the top and sides, low-gloss finish with faint scuffs and no visible hardware; appears photographed at approximately 1.0 m distance.
